features.description: Drilled & counterbored holes for .500 socket head cap screws, located at corners of the plate (17.50 x 11.25 pattern)
.531 DIA drill thru holes, inner rectangular pattern (7.000 x 6.000 spacing approx)
Short vertical hidden/construction lines near center-left of plate, unclear purpose (possibly edge of pocket or hidden feature)
Dashed rectangular outline in center of plate, possibly indicating a pocket, boss, or hidden feature boundary
Small hidden-line detail visible in side/edge view near right end, possibly a slot or step

notes: Overview shows a rectangular plate, 17.50 x 11.25 x 1.00 in, with two bolt hole patterns: 4 counterbored clearance holes at corners for .500 socket head cap screws, and 4 straight .531 dia thru holes in an inner rectangular pattern. A thin edge/side view below confirms 1.00 in thickness and shows some hidden-line detail (possibly a slot or step) that is not clearly resolved. Faint dashed lines in the middle of the top view may indicate a hidden feature (pocket or boss) but are not clearly legible.
